untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identifying broadening formation structure (diverging trend lines, highest high, horizontal trend line, formation height calculation). These require multi-bar pattern recognition and geometric measurement not available in the allowed indicator set. The measure rule targets require computing formation height and adding/subtracting from specific price levels, which cannot be expressed with simple indicator comparisons. Intraformation trade entry (buy near lower trend line on tall patterns) requires trend line detection and distance calculations not supported.
translation_notes: Signal describes a chart pattern (Broadening Formation) with complex geometric requirements and measure rule targets. Basic breakout direction logic substituted (close crossing prev_high/prev_low), but this does not capture the full pattern specification. To properly implement, would need: (1) pattern detection engine for broadening formations, (2) trend line calculation and storage, (3) formation height computation, (4) dynamic target calculation. Author provided no statistical parameters (success rates, average moves, failure rates), limiting risk/reward configuration.
